title: Implement sync-meta rule-test index generation
description: Extend sync-meta to scan test files for // @fabric-verify <stable_id>, resolve stable IDs against computed AgentsMeta, hash test files, preserve previous_rule_hash/previous_test_hash from prior index, write .fabric/rule-test.index.json, and include the sidecar in --check-only drift detection.
test: CLI sync-meta tests cover index generation, orphan annotations, previous hash preservation, and check-only drift when index is stale.
acceptance_criteria: fabric sync-meta writes both agents.meta.json and rule-test.index.json; check-only fails when either generated artifact is stale; scanner supports only single-line // @fabric-verify <stable_id> in V1.
hints: Build helper near sync-meta but keep responsibilities small; reuse sha256 and existing file walking style || packages/cli/src/commands/sync-meta.ts;packages/cli/__tests__/sync-meta.test.ts;packages/shared/src/schemas/rule-test-index.ts
prev_context:
[Explore sync-meta-integration] sync-meta currently computes/writes only agents.meta.json and check-only compares stableStringify(existingMeta) vs computedMeta. V1 sidecar should be computeRuleTestIndex(target, computedMeta, previousIndex?) and check-only must compare both meta and index. Preserve previous hashes by prior entry key stable_id+test_file+line. No existing @fabric-verify support.
[Task T1] Added RuleTestIndex schema in packages/shared/src/schemas/rule-test-index.ts and exported it from packages/shared/src/index.ts.

title: Add doctor static rule-test contracts check

test: Doctor service tests cover covered, stale_rule, stale_test, orphan stable_id, missing test file, missing index, and missing coverage behavior.
acceptance_criteria: runDoctorReport includes a generic Rule-test contracts check; CLI doctor output works via existing generic renderer; severity choices are explicit and documented in tests.

execution_directives: pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server build and targeted vitest if configured
